description: Style Noteboss No.6 cologne is fresh and sharp with a woody base, with a modern flacon. The nose behind this very successful fragrance is Annick Menardo.  Product DetailsThe top notes are apple and citrus balanced with a heart of pelargonium, warm cinnamon, and cloves. The base notes are very masculine - sandalwood, vetiver and precious cedar.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize200 ml
